org.key_project.util.collection

Class DefaultImmutableMap<S,T>

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.key_project.util.collection.DefaultImmutableMap<S,T>
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.io.Serializable, java.lang.Iterable<ImmutableMapEntry<S,T>>, ImmutableMap<S,T>

    public class DefaultImmutableMap<S,T>
extends java.lang.Object
implements ImmutableMap<S,T>
    This class implements ImmMap and provides a persistent Map. It is a simple implementation like lists
    See Also:
    Serialized Form

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Modifier Constructor and Description
      protected DefaultImmutableMap()
      only for use by NILMap
      protected DefaultImmutableMap(ImmutableMapEntry<S,T> entry)
      creates new map with mapping entry
      protected DefaultImmutableMap(ImmutableMapEntry<S,T> entry, DefaultImmutableMap<S,T> parent)
      creates new map with mapping entry and parent map

      All Methods Static Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description

      boolean containsValue(T value) 
      boolean equals(java.lang.Object o)

      boolean isEmpty()
      returns true if the map is empty

      java.util.Iterator<S> keyIterator() 
      static <S,T> DefaultImmutableMap<S,T> nilMap()
      the empty map
      ImmutableMap<S,T> put(S key, T value)
      inserts mapping into the map (old map is not modified) if key exists old entry has to be removed null is not allowed for key or value.
      DefaultImmutableMap<S,T> remove(S key)
      removes mapping (key,...) from map
      ImmutableMap<S,T> removeAll(T value)
      removes all mappings (...,value) from map

      java.lang.String toString()

    • Constructor Detail

      • DefaultImmutableMap

        protected DefaultImmutableMap()
        only for use by NILMap

      • DefaultImmutableMap

        protected DefaultImmutableMap(ImmutableMapEntry<S,T> entry)
        creates new map with mapping entry

      • DefaultImmutableMap

        protected DefaultImmutableMap(ImmutableMapEntry<S,T> entry,
                              DefaultImmutableMap<S,T> parent)
        creates new map with mapping entry and parent map

    • Method Detail

      • nilMap

        public static <S,T> DefaultImmutableMap<S,T> nilMap()
        the empty map

      • put

        public ImmutableMap<S,T> put(S key,
                             T value)
        inserts mapping into the map (old map is not modified) if key exists old entry has to be removed null is not allowed for key or value.
        Specified by:
        put in interface ImmutableMap<S,T>
        Parameters:
        key - a S to be used as key
        value - a T to be stored as value
        Returns:
        a ImmMap including the pair and all other pairs of the current map with keys different from the given key

      • get

        public T get(S key)
        Specified by:
        get in interface ImmutableMap<S,T>
        Returns:
        value of type T that is mapped by key of type S

      • size

        public int size()
        Specified by:
        size in interface ImmutableMap<S,T>
        Returns:
        number of entries as int

      • isEmpty

        public boolean isEmpty()
        returns true if the map is empty
        Specified by:
        isEmpty in interface ImmutableMap<S,T>
        Returns:
        true iff the map is empty

      • containsKey

        public boolean containsKey(S key)
        Specified by:
        containsKey in interface ImmutableMap<S,T>
        Returns:
        true iff the map includes key

      • containsValue

        public boolean containsValue(T value)
        Specified by:
        containsValue in interface ImmutableMap<S,T>
        Returns:
        true iff the map includes value

      • remove

        public DefaultImmutableMap<S,T> remove(S key)
        removes mapping (key,...) from map
        Specified by:
        remove in interface ImmutableMap<S,T>
        Returns:
        the new map (the same if key is not in the map)

      • removeAll

        public ImmutableMap<S,T> removeAll(T value)
        removes all mappings (...,value) from map
        Specified by:
        removeAll in interface ImmutableMap<S,T>
        Returns:
        the new map (the same if value is not mapped)

      • keyIterator

        public java.util.Iterator<S> keyIterator()
        Specified by:
        keyIterator in interface ImmutableMap<S,T>
        Returns:
        iterator for all keys

      • valueIterator

        public java.util.Iterator<T> valueIterator()
        Specified by:
        valueIterator in interface ImmutableMap<S,T>
        Returns:
        iterator for all values

        Returns:
